description: This file defines the interface DefectRepository, extending JpaRepository, providing methods for querying Defect entities based on various criteria such as severity, status, reported date, and text content.

classes.name: DefectRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for Defect entity, providing custom query methods.

methods.name: findBySeverity
methods.description: Queries defects based on their severity, returning a paginated list.

methods.name: findByStatus
methods.description: Queries defects based on their status, returning a paginated list.

methods.name: findByReportedDateBetween
methods.description: Finds defects reported between two dates, paginated.

methods.name: findByTitleContainingIgnoreCaseOrDescriptionContainingIgnoreCase
methods.description: Searches defects by title or description, ignoring case sensitivity.
